title: First-Line Supervisors of Helpers, Laborers, and Material Movers, Hand
description: Directly supervise and coordinate the activities of helpers, laborers, or material movers, hand.

tasks.text: Maintain a safe working environment by monitoring safety procedures and equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Collaborate with workers and managers to solve work-related problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review work throughout the work process and at completion to ensure that it has been performed properly.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inform designated employees or departments of items loaded or problems encountered.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inspect equipment for wear and for conformance to specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Prepare and maintain work records and reports of information such as employee time and wages, daily receipts, or inspection results.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Transmit and explain work orders to laborers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Plan work schedules and assign duties to maintain adequate staff for effective performance of activities and response to fluctuating workloads.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Participate in the hiring process by reviewing credentials, conducting interviews, or making hiring decisions or recommendations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Estimate material, time, and staffing requirements for a given project, based on work orders, job specifications, and experience.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Counsel employees in work-related activities, personal growth, or career development.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assess training needs of staff and arrange for or provide appropriate instruction.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Conduct staff meetings to relay general information or to address specific topics, such as safety.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Check specifications of materials loaded or unloaded against information contained in work orders.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform the same work duties as those supervised, or perform more difficult or skilled tasks or assist in their performance.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Resolve personnel problems, complaints, or formal grievances when possible, or refer them to higher-level supervisors for resolution.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Recommend or initiate personnel actions, such as promotions, transfers, or disciplinary measures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate employee performance and prepare performance appraisals.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Examine freight to determine loading sequences.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Schedule times of shipment and modes of transportation for materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inventory supplies and requisition or purchase additional items, as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Quote prices to customers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide assistance in balancing books, tracking, monitoring, or projecting a unit's budget needs, and in developing unit policies and procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inspect job sites to determine the extent of maintenance or repairs needed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.
